subject: Saturday Show - Guest Confirmation
body_preview: Rebecca, your guest Rev. Angela Dawson is confirmed for the January 24 broadcast. Segment starts at 7:30. Let me know if anything changes.

subject: Sponsor Invoice - January
body_preview: Hi Rebecca, please find your January sponsorship invoice attached. Amount due: $400 by January 31. Thank you for the continued partnership.

subject: CPE Hours - Reminder
body_preview: Rebecca, a reminder that the CPE continuing-education deadline is December 31. You have 28 of 50 required hours logged. Please plan your remaining modules before year-end.

subject: Re: Naomi - Financial Proxy Docs
body_preview: Mom, I signed and sent back the updated healthcare proxy form. Let me know if you need anything else for the file.

subject: Marcus Tuition - Spring Payment Confirmation
body_preview: Rebecca, I sent my half of Marcus's spring tuition directly to Crescent City University on December 22 as agreed. Confirmation number attached.

subject: Brunch Saturday - Cafe Eclectic?
body_preview: Girl, I will be at Cafe Eclectic by 10. You bringing anything from the studio or coming straight over? I need to catch you up on what happened at the college this week.

subject: Health Fair - Volunteer Sign-Ups
body_preview: Sister Rebecca, we have 14 volunteers signed up so far for the community health fair. I still need two more nurses and a phlebotomist. Sandra Coles said she may be able to help. Blessings, Deacon Mosley.

subject: Morning Reflections - Listener Feedback
body_preview: Rebecca, great show last Saturday. We had 11,200 listeners - one of the highest counts this year. Several callers mentioned the grief segment. Keep doing what you are doing.

subject: Re: Pastoral Care Staff Meeting - January Agenda
body_preview: Rebecca, I am attaching the January staff meeting agenda. Please review the CPE resident evaluation rubric before we meet on Monday.

subject: Sermon Collaboration Inquiry
body_preview: Rebecca, I would love to co-present at the APC conference in February. I am working on a session about compassion fatigue in hospital chaplaincy. Would you be open to joining me?

subject: Flower Arrangement Order - Honoring the Women of Faith
body_preview: Your order of seasonal arrangement (zinnias, lavender, sunflowers) for Dorothy Price has been confirmed for December 24 delivery. Order total: $62.50.

subject: Sermon Notes - Sunday Meditation
body_preview: Rebecca, here are my notes for Sunday's meditation theme - Seasons of Renewal. I would appreciate your thoughts before Sunday. God bless, Pastor Greer.

subject: Bluff City Auto Care - WGSP Spot Renewal
body_preview: Hi Rebecca, we would like to renew our radio spot for the next quarter on Morning Reflections. Please send us the updated rates when you get a chance. Thank you.

subject: Marcus - Internship Check-In
body_preview: Hey Mom, I got the internship at Beale Street Radio for the spring term. Wanted you to be the first to know. I start February 9. Love you.

subject: Nutritionist Recap - January Session
body_preview: Rebecca, great progress this month - you are down 12 lbs total. I am attaching the updated meal framework for the next four weeks. Keep up the Greenline walks. Talk soon.

subject: Brenda - Checking In on Dorothy
body_preview: Becca, how is Mama doing? I am coming up the last weekend of January and want to stop by. Let me know what she needs and I will bring it from Jackson.

subject: Mitchell's Flowers - January Arrangement Ready
body_preview: Your standing monthly arrangement (zinnias and black-eyed Susans) is ready for pickup or delivery this Friday. Confirm your preference by Thursday noon.

subject: Association of Professional Chaplains - Conference Registration
body_preview: Your registration for the APC Annual Conference, February 9-11 in Nashville, is confirmed. Please review the schedule and CEU session list attached.
